title: jasione supina subsp. pontica
intro: Jasione supina subsp. pontica, also known as Pontic bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
